title: Realmfall Cobblemon
description: The official mod pack for Realmfall: Cobblemon!
body:
# What is this?

This is the official modpack for the Realmfall cobblemon server!
This pack is required in order to play on the server, due to certain mod compatibility issues.

Think the pack is missing a nice feature? Tell us in our [discord](https://discord.gg/yYaQp9fDuW)!

# Server features

- Breeding
- GTS & WonderTrade
- STS
- Warps
- Hunt System
- Player Towns
- Claim System & Sethome
- Unique map
- PokeGift
- No Fall Damage

# Coming Soon!

- Player Gyms
- Player Shops
- Dex Rewards
- And more!
